slots.name: badge
slots.notes: Small label above the headline. E.g., 'New AI Version 3.0 released'

slots.name: subheadline
slots.notes: Short description block under the title, restricted to 65-75ch

layout_variants.name: Swiss Minimalist Editorial (2D Typographic)
layout_variants.description: 2D minimalist layout inspired by OpenNote. Giant main headline occupies the majority of the viewport, styled with left-aligned artistic offset alignment and generous whitespace. Integrates Lenis smooth scroll and opposing horizontal text parallax combined with SplitTextReveal.

visual_specs.typography: Display Heading in bold Kanit or Inter fonts (font-black text-[8vw] leading-[0.85] tracking-[-0.04em] uppercase), body text limited to 65ch.
visual_specs.spacing: Large negative spaces and paddings (py-32). Avoid wrapping cards or borders, letting elements float freely in open space.
visual_specs.colors: Warm light backgrounds oklch(0.97 0.005 240) or dark backgrounds oklch(0.12 0.005 240). Color accents are restricted to links and text hover states. Fade secondary text to 30% opacity using highlightWords.
visual_specs.layout: Asymmetrical typography grid with staggered lines of text.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Opposing horizontal typography parallax on scroll: gsap.to('.line-1', { x: -80, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.hero', scrub: true } }) and gsap.to('.line-2', { x: 80, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.hero', scrub: true } }).
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: SplitTextReveal slides words up: gsap.fromTo('.word', { yPercent: 100, opacity: 0 }, { yPercent: 0, opacity: 1, stagger: 0.03, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.hero', start: 'top 80%', end: 'top 40%', scrub: 0.3 } }).
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Link hover sweep: Hovering over buttons or text links sweeps a smooth oklch underline underline over 200ms.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .hero-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; min-height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; }

anti_patterns: Forbidden border-stripe elements, forbidden button corner radiuses larger than 8px.
Forbidden blurry/broad drop shadows and forbidden gradient text.

layout_variants.name: Cinematic Video Fullscreen
layout_variants.description: Fullscreen atmospheric video background, with the main heading positioned prominently in the center. Uses GSAP ScrollTrigger to scale down the background video container slightly while fading text on scroll down.

visual_specs.typography: Centered heading in bold Serif or Display Sans (text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight).
visual_specs.colors: Background video covered by a dark overlay oklch(0.1 0.01 240 / 0.5) to ensure white text oklch(0.99 0 0) maintains contrast ratio >= 4.5:1.
visual_specs.layout: Fully centered column, with the video placed absolute/fixed (inset-0) in the background.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Scroll-scrub video scale: gsap.to('.hero-video', { scale: 0.95, opacity: 0.3, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.hero', start: 'top top', end: 'bottom top', scrub: true } }).
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: Fade out text: gsap.to('.hero-content', { y: -50, opacity: 0, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.hero', start: 'top top', end: 'bottom top', scrub: true } }).
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Magnetic Play Button: Central play button magnetically pulls towards the cursor within a 100px radius using gsap.quickTo.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .hero-video-wrapper { position: absolute; inset: 0; overflow: hidden; z-index: 0; }

anti_patterns: Forbidden auto-playing background video with audio enabled; video must be muted.
Forbidden harsh text shadows to compensate for poor backdrop contrast; use a solid dark overlay instead.

layout_variants.name: 3D Floating Orbs & Centered Headline
layout_variants.description: Sophisticated centered layout with two floating 3D orb shapes on both sides. 3D objects float infinitely via CSS and tilt 3D following mouse coordinates.

visual_specs.typography: Centered Display Heading in bold geometric sans, clean subtitle at 60ch.
visual_specs.spacing: Padding py-32. Blank margins reserved on both sides for 3D objects.
visual_specs.colors: Deep dark slate background oklch(0.15 0.01 240). Glowing mint or emerald 3D orbs reflect light on the background.
visual_specs.layout: Centered layout, with 3D orbs placed absolute on both sides (left-10 and right-10).

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Split-Text Entrance: gsap.from('.char', { yPercent: 100, opacity: 0, stagger: 0.02, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power4.out' }).
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: ScrollTrigger parallax: gsap.to('.orb', { y: -100, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.hero', start: 'top top', end: 'bottom top', scrub: 1 } }).
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: 3D Tilt: const tx = (mouse.x - center.x) * 0.15; const ty = (mouse.y - center.y) * 0.15; gsap.to('.orb', { x: tx, y: ty, rotateX: -ty*0.5, rotateY: tx*0.5, duration: 0.5 }).

anti_patterns: Forbidden large button corner radiuses; maximum 12px.
Forbidden gradient text across the entire subheadline.

counter_curtain.intent: Preloader runs numeric count-up from 00 to 100, then slides a black vertical curtain up to reveal the Hero section.

split_text_headline.intent: Main title Split-Line reveal slides words up staggered from below baseline.

video_backdrop_shrink.intent: Scrolling down scales background video down slightly and fades it.

magnetic_button.intent: Central Play button is magnetically attracted towards the mouse cursor.

background_orbs_glow.intent: Background glowing orbs pulse and shift colors slowly.

in.description: Hero starts at top: 0, content padding-top matches navbar height.

out.description: Hero bottom fades into the background color of the next section. Avoid hard lines.
